decks.notes: This deck aims to quickly and efficiently combo out its opponent by utilizing the interaction between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle. By preventing the drawbacks of Dreadnought from occurring, the deck is able to establish a dominant board presence early in the game. Winter Orb is used to slow down the opponent's mana development, while a suite of counterspells and card draw spells help to protect the combo and dig for essential pieces. The deck is focused on disrupting the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win condition in a fast and consistent manner.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with beneficial abilities to control the board and survive against aggressive opponents. The key strategy involves using cards like Wall of Blossoms and Wall of Roots to stall early game aggression, while also using Survival of the Fittest to tutor for key creatures like Triskelion and Exalted Angel. Parallax Wave and Opalescence provide synergistic control elements, while cards like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing offer versatile removal options. The deck aims to outvalue opponents through card advantage and efficient creature interactions.

The deck focuses on utilizing enchantments to generate card advantage and mana acceleration. By using cards like Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile, the player can draw multiple cards each turn while also ramping up their mana with Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. The deck also includes powerful combo pieces such as Opalescence and Parallax Wave to control the board and generate a win condition. Overall, the strategy revolves around creating a synergistic engine of enchantments to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of efficient white creatures, using cards like Mother of Runes and Soltari Champion to protect and boost their creatures. This aggressive strategy is supported by removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Disenchant to keep the opponent's board clear. The deck also includes some utility cards like Enlightened Tutor and Seal of Cleansing to provide additional options. Overall, the goal is to establish a strong board presence early and maintain pressure until the opponent is overwhelmed.

The central idea of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan through a combination of discard spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress, removal spells like Innocent Blood and Smother, and board control cards like Contamination and Engineered Plague. The deck also utilizes graveyard recursion with Nether Spirit and card draw with Skeletal Scrying. The land base includes utility lands like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck aims to grind out the opponent's resources and win through attrition.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through resource denial and removal spells while utilizing the Oath of Druids card to quickly summon powerful creatures like Terravore. The use of lands like Wasteland and Rishadan Port disrupts the opponent's mana base, while cards like Pyroclasm and Stone Rain help to control the board. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, this deck aims to gain the upper hand and overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures.

The focus of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with fast, aggressive creatures and burn spells, dealing damage quickly and efficiently. By deploying inexpensive, hasty creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic alongside powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, you can quickly reduce your opponent's life total to zero. The aim is to maintain a fast pace and keep up the pressure, using cards like Grim Lavamancer and Sulfuric Vortex to ensure your opponent has little opportunity to stabilise or mount a defense.

This deck aims to quickly flood the board with creatures and use Zombie Infestation to create a swarm of zombies. The key strategy is to use cards like Wild Mongrel and Basking Rootwalla to discard creatures and fuel Zombie Infestation, while also utilizing cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes a Survival of the Fittest package to tutor for key creatures and maintain pressure on the opponent. With a mix of resilience and aggression, this Zombie Infestation Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless onslaught.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruption spells in order to control the pace of the game. By utilizing a combination of discard spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress, along with creatures like Ravenous Rats and Hypnotic Specter, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's hand while applying pressure on the board. The inclusion of cards like Withered Wretch and Graveborn Muse provide additional utility and card advantage, while cards like Masticore and Powder Keg offer versatile removal options to deal with opposing threats.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board through removal spells and angel and dragon threats, while also gaining life with Renewed Faith. The deck also utilizes the Urza's lands to ramp up mana for big spells like Decree of Justice. Mobilization helps to create a board presence with soldier tokens. The inclusion of Disenchant and Phyrexian Furnace allows for removal of troublesome artifacts and graveyards. Overall, the deck aims to outlast opponents with powerful control elements and finish the game with large flying creatures and a wide board presence.

The strategy of this deck revolves around utilizing cards like Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. By controlling the board with counterspells and disruption spells like Daze and Foil, the deck aims to prevent the opponent from countering or removing the key pieces of the combo. The inclusion of cards like Vision Charm and Portent helps to set up draws and maintain consistency. Mishra's Factory provides a creature option for additional pressure on the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through removal, hand disruption, and value creatures, while also utilizing recursion and card advantage to outlast the opponent. By generating incremental advantage with cards like Wall of Blossoms and Birds of Paradise, the deck aims to establish a solid board presence and grind out the opponent with powerful threats like Ravenous Baloth and Deranged Hermit. Pernicious Deed acts as a catch-all answer to problematic permanents, while cards like Recurring Nightmare and Haunting Echoes provide additional value and disruption. Overall, the deck excels at outlasting opponents and controlling the game's pace.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overpower the opponent with aggressive creatures that benefit from discarding cards, enabling Madness and filling the graveyard for Threshold. By efficiently utilizing cards like Wild Mongrel and Circular Logic, the deck aims to control the board while constantly applying pressure. Key cards like Arrogant Wurm and Basking Rootwalla provide strong threats that can quickly end the game if left unchecked. The deck also includes some card draw and counter spells to maintain tempo and disruption against opposing strategies.

This deck aims to aggressively fill up the graveyard to enable powerful effects like Madness and Threshold. Cards like Aquamoeba, Wild Mongrel, and Basking Rootwalla help discard cards while also providing early aggression. Circular Logic, Daze, and Foil provide disruption against the opponent's plays, while Intuition helps tutor for key cards. Deep Analysis provides card advantage, while Roar of the Wurm provides a strong finisher. The deck runs a slim mana base to ensure fast starts and consistent casting of spells.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By utilizing cards with Madness and Threshold mechanics, you can maintain a steady stream of threats on the battlefield while disrupting your opponent's game plan with counterspells and removal. The inclusion of cards like Survival of the Fittest and Wild Mongrel allows you to consistently dig through your deck and find the perfect cards for any situation. With a focus on early pressure and efficient resource management, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver your opponent for a decisive victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures while also utilizing the Zombie Infestation card to generate a continuous stream of zombie tokens. The deck is built around efficiently filling up the graveyard with creatures such as Birds of Paradise, Basking Rootwalla, and Wild Mongrel to fuel the Survival of the Fittest engine and create a constant threat on the board. With a blend of efficiency, graveyard synergy, and disruption through cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress, this deck aims to consistently pressure the opponent and close out games quickly.
